name: HELIOS Platform Automation
description: Copilot Studio action map for local + Azure HELIOS automation.

actions.name: submitAutomationJob
actions.purpose: Queue local or cloud automation work.

actions.name: publishFleetEvent
actions.purpose: Publish Hermes fleet telemetry and state changes.

actions.name: queryOperationalHealth
actions.purpose: Answer operational health questions from telemetry.

actions.name: retrieveSecretReference
actions.purpose: Resolve approved secret references without exposing values.
